/.title: Ijebu-Igbo Heritage — The Orimolusi, the Seven Towns & Their History
/.description: A living archive of Ijebu-Igbo, Ogun State — the Orimolusi paramount stool, the seven Town Obas, and the history, places and people of this Yoruba kingdom.

/about.title: About This Archive | Ijebu-Igbo Heritage
/about.description: Why this archive exists: a free, growing record of Ijebu-Igbo's Orimolusi, its seven Town Obas, and the town's history for anyone tracing their roots.

/heritage.title: Ijebu-Igbo Heritage: Orimolusi, Council of Obas & History
/heritage.description: Explore Ijebu-Igbo's history, the Orimolusi paramount ruler, the Council of Obas, and the seven towns of this Yoruba kingdom in Ogun State, Nigeria.

/gallery.title: Gallery — Ijebu-Igbo Towns, Palaces & Festivals
/gallery.description: Photos of Ijebu-Igbo's towns, palaces, landmarks and festivals, including Ojude Oba.

/contact.title: Contact | Ijebu-Igbo Heritage
/contact.description: Get in touch with the Ijebu-Igbo Heritage archive — corrections, contributions, and general enquiries.

/blog.title: Ijebu-Igbo Blog — History, Kingship & Culture
/blog.description: Articles on Ijebu-Igbo's history, the Orimolusi and Town Obas, oriki, chieftaincy titles and culture.

/tourism.title: Visit Ijebu-Igbo: Attractions & Landmarks
/tourism.description: Things to do in Ijebu-Igbo, Ogun State — top landmarks, heritage sites, and tourism tips for visitors.

/ojowo.title: Ojowo, Ijebu Igbo — Olokine of Ojowo | Heritage
/ojowo.description: Discover Ojowo, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Olokine ruler, chiefs and Baales within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/japara.title: Japara, Ijebu Igbo — Abijaparako of Japara | Heritage
/japara.description: Discover Japara, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Abijaparako ruler, history, chiefs and Ituns within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/atikori.title: Atikori, Ijebu Igbo — Keegbo of Atikori | Heritage
/atikori.description: Discover Atikori, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Keegbo ruler, eight Itun agba, heritage places and anthem within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/oke-sopen.title: Oke-Sopen, Ijebu Igbo — Sopenlukale of Oke-Sopen | Heritage
/oke-sopen.description: Discover Oke-Sopen, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Sopenlukale ruler and the full history of past rulers since 1886.

/oke-agbo.title: Oke-Agbo, Ijebu Igbo — Bejeroku of Oke-Agbo | Heritage
/oke-agbo.description: Discover Oke-Agbo, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Bejeroku ruler and the Baales of its constituent villages.

/imope-ijebu.title: Imope-Ijebu — Onimope of Imope-Ijebu | Heritage
/imope-ijebu.description: Discover Imope-Ijebu, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), and its Onimope ruler.

/aparaki.title: Aparaki — Alaparaki of Aparaki | Heritage
/aparaki.description: Discover Aparaki, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), and its Alaparaki ruler.
